## Summary

<!-- One paragraph describing what this PR does and why. Link related issues. -->

Closes #<!-- issue number -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `refactor` — code restructuring (no logic change)
- [ ] `test` — tests only
- [ ] `chore` — tooling / CI / dependency update
- [ ] `perf` — performance improvement

## Checklist

- [ ] My branch is up to date with `main`
- [ ] `make build` passes locally (compile + tests + Spotless check)
- [ ] I have run `make format` and committed the result
- [ ] New code is covered by unit tests (or I have explained why not)
- [ ] I have updated relevant documentation (README, ARCHITECTURE.md, ADRs)
- [ ] This PR does **not** introduce or expose real PHI / production credentials
- [ ] I have added a Conventional Commits-style title (e.g. `feat(ingestion): …`)
